title: Not as a Stranger
writer: Edna Anhalt, Edward Anhalt, Morton Thompson
actors: Olivia de Havilland, Frank Sinatra, Robert Mitchum
plot: An ego-driven, aspiring physician, intolerant of the weaknesses of others, especially those closest to him, comes to grips with his own imperfections.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
